title: OAuth2 authorize page + token exchange + revoke
description: Implement the full OAuth2 authorization code flow and password grant. GET /oauth/authorize: render a minimal HTML form where admin enters password and selects which persona to authenticate as. POST /oauth/authorize: validate password, create authorization code, redirect. POST /oauth/token: exchange code for bearer token, or handle password grant for CLI-minted tokens. POST /oauth/revoke: invalidate token.
design: Auth code: 32 random bytes base64url, stored as SHA-256 hash in oauth_authz_codes, expires 10 minutes. Bearer token: 64 random bytes base64url, stored as SHA-256 hash. Auth page: minimal HTML, no JavaScript required, admin password + persona dropdown. Rate limit: 3 failed logins/minute per IP, in-memory.
acceptance_criteria: Ivory and Elk can complete the OAuth2 login flow; authorization code expires after use; token is stored as SHA-256 hash; wrong password returns correct OAuth2 error response; revoke invalidates token immediately
